title: rel2bin_join: Assertion `sql->session->status == -10' failed.
description: Running the query posted below produces this assertions. With assertions off, the prompt is returned without any results or errors.
poc: SELECT count(*) FROM (SELECT a1, a2, a5 AS a3, a6 AS a4, max(prob) AS prob FROM (SELECT a1, a2, a3, a4, a5, a6, a7, a8, prob FROM (SELECT a1, a2, a3, a4, a5, a6, a7, a8, CAST(sql_min(a4,a8) - sql_max(a3,a7) + 1 AS DOUBLE) / CAST(sql_max(a4,a8) - sql_min(a3,a7) + 1 AS DOUBLE) AS prob FROM (SELECT t__x12.a1 AS a1, t__x12.a2 AS a2, t__x12.a3 AS a3, t__x12.a4 AS a4, t__x15.a1 AS a5, t__x15.a2 AS a6, t__x15.a3 AS a7, t__x15.a4 AS a8, t__x12.prob * t__x15.prob AS prob FROM (SELECT a7 AS a1, a8 AS a2, a3, a6 AS a4, prob FROM (SELECT _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm.a1 AS a1, _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm.a2 AS a2, _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm.a3 AS a3, t__x10.a1 AS a4, t__x10.a2 AS a5, t__x10.a3 AS a6, t__x10.a4 AS a7, t__x10.a5 AS a8, _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm.prob * t__x10.prob AS prob FROM _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm,(SELECT _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize.a1 AS a1, _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize.a2 AS a2, _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize.a3 AS a3, _c_cfx7gec6lhdys5gigksytextqm.a1 AS a4, _c_cfx7gec6lhdys5gigksytextqm.a2 AS a5, _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize.prob * _c_cfx7gec6lhdys5gigksytextqm.prob AS prob FROM _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize,_c_cfx7gec6lhdys5gigksytextqm WHERE _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize.a1 = _c_cfx7gec6lhdys5gigksytextqm.a1) AS t__x10 WHERE _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm.a1 = t__x10.a1) AS t__x11) AS t__x12,(SELECT a7 AS a1, a8 AS a2, a3, a6 AS a4, prob FROM (SELECT _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm.a1 AS a1, _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm.a2 AS a2, _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm.a3 AS a3, t__x13.a1 AS a4, t__x13.a2 AS a5, t__x13.a3 AS a6, t__x13.a4 AS a7, t__x13.a5 AS a8, _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm.prob * t__x13.prob AS prob FROM _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm,(SELECT _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize.a1 AS a1, _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize.a2 AS a2, _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize.a3 AS a3, _c_cav343ddbbvgz5yojhds5chauu.a1 AS a4, _c_cav343ddbbvgz5yojhds5chauu.a2 AS a5, _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize.prob * _c_cav343ddbbvgz5yojhds5chauu.prob AS prob FROM _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize,_c_cav343ddbbvgz5yojhds5chauu WHERE _c_cox443w2dr5qjvpyplp53xyize.a1 = _c_cav343ddbbvgz5yojhds5chauu.a1) AS t__x13 WHERE _c_c46cgput7undnshcixwdcqgcnm.a1 = t__x13.a1) AS t__x14) AS t__x15 WHERE t__x12.a2 = t__x15.a2 AND sql_min(t__x12.a4,t__x15.a4) - sql_max(t__x12.a3,t__x15.a3) >= 0) AS t__x16) AS t__x17 WHERE prob > 0.0e0) AS t__x18 GROUP BY a1, a2, a5, a6) AS t__x19;
key_bug_features: Assertion failure during complex SQL query execution
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table1 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, value DOUBLE, created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
CREATE TABLE test_table2 (id INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, ref_id INTEGER, description TEXT, FOREIGN KEY (ref_id) REFERENCES test_table1(id));
INSERT INTO test_table1 (id, value) VALUES (1, 10.5), (2, NULL), (3, 20.0);
INSERT INTO test_table2 (id, ref_id, description) VALUES (1, 1, 'First entry'), (2, 2, 'Second entry'), (3, 3, 'Third entry');
SELECT t1.id, t1.value, t2.description FROM test_table1 t1 LEFT JOIN test_table2 t2 ON t1.id = t2.ref_id WHERE t1.value IS NOT NULL AND t2.description IS NOT NULL;
